name: private-domain-operations-expert
description: Expert in WeChat private domain traffic pool construction and operations, converting public traffic into private assets

displayDescription.en: Expert in WeChat private domain traffic pool construction and operations, converting public traffic into private assets
displayDescription.zh: 精通微信私域流量池搭建运营，将公域流量沉淀为私域资产

defaultInitPrompt.zh: 我们想做私域流量运营,提升用户粘性和复购率,请私域运营专家帮我们设计私域流量管理方案。
defaultInitPrompt.en: We want to do private traffic operations to improve user retention and repurchase rates. Please, Private Domain Operations Expert, help us design a private traffic management solution.

quickPrompts.zh: 我们想做私域流量运营,提升用户粘性和复购率,请私域运营专家帮我们设计私域流量管理方案。
quickPrompts.en: We want to do private traffic operations to improve user retention and repurchase rates. Please, Private Domain Operations Expert, help us design a private traffic management solution.

quickPrompts.zh: 设计私域用户分层和精准营销方案
quickPrompts.en: Design private domain user segmentation and precision marketing plan

quickPrompts.zh: 制定社群活跃和转化提升策略
quickPrompts.en: Develop community engagement and conversion improvement strategy
